upsert.description: Create a new contact, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

remove.description: Remove a contact from a list

getFields.description: Get all fields from a form

resolveData.description: By default the response only includes the ID. If this option gets activated, it will resolve the data automatically.

annualRevenue.description: The actual or estimated annual revenue of the company

associatedCompanyId.description: Companies associated with the ticket. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

city.description: The city where the company is located

closeDate.description: The date the ticket was closed

contactOwner.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

property.description: Name of the property. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
Name of the property. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fieldOfStudy.description: A contact's field of study. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

graduationDate.description: A contact's graduation date. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

industry.description: The type of business the company performs. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

jobFunction.description: A contact's job function. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

leadStatus.description: The company's sales, prospecting or outreach status. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

processingContactData.displayName: Legal Basic For Processing Contact Data Name or ID
processingContactData.description: Legal basis for processing contact's data; 'Not applicable' will exempt the contact from GDPR protections. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

lifeCycleStage.description: The qualification of contacts to sales readiness. It can be set through imports, forms, workflows, and manually on a per contact basis. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

maritalStatus.description: A contact's marital status. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

membershipNote.description: The notes relating to the contact's content membership

message.description: A default property to be used for any message or comments a contact may want to leave on a form

numberOfEmployees.description: The total number of employees who work for the company or organization

originalSource.description: The first known source through which a contact found your website. Source is automatically set by HubSpot, but may be updated manually. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

phoneNumber.description: A company's primary phone number. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

properties.description:
Used to include specific ticket properties in the results. By default, the results will only include ticket ID and will not include the values for any properties for your company.

Including this parameter will include the data for the specified property in the results. You can include this parameter multiple times to request multiple properties separated by a comma: ,.

. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

postalCode.description: The postal or zip code of the company or organization. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

prefferedLanguage.description: Set your contact's preferred language for communications. This property can be changed from an import, form, or integration. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

relationshipStatus.description: A contact's relationship status. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

salutation.description: The title used to address a contact

school.description: A contact's school. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

seniority.description: A contact's seniority. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

startDate.description: A contact's start date. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

stateRegion.description: The state or region in which the company or organization is located. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

status.description: The status of the contact's content membership. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

streetAddress.description: The street address of the company or organization, including unit number. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

twitterUsername.description: The contact's Twitter handle. This is set by HubSpot using the contact's email address.

websiteUrl.description: The main website of the company or organization. This property is used to identify unique companies. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

workEmail.description: A contact's work email. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

formSubmissionMode.description: Specify which form submissions should be fetched

listMemberships.description: Whether current list memberships should be fetched for the contact

propertyMode.description: Specify if the current value for a property should be fetched, or the value and all the historical values for that property

direction.description: Defines the direction in which search results are ordered. Default value is DESC.

query.description: Perform a text search against all property values for an object type

sortBy.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

googlePlusPage.description: The URL of the Google Plus page for the company or organization

isPublic.description: Whether that the company is publicly traded

lifecycleStatus.description: The most advanced lifecycle stage across all contacts associated with this company or organization. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

linkedinBio.description: The LinkedIn bio for the company or organization

linkedInCompanyPage.description: The URL of the LinkedIn company page for the company or organization

originalSourceType.displayName: Original Source Type Name or ID

streetAddress2.description: The additional address of the company or organization. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

timezone.description: The time zone where the company or organization is located. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

totalMoneyRaised.description: The total amount of money raised by the company. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

twitterFollowers.description: The number of Twitter followers of the company or organization

webTechnologies.description: The web technologies used by the company or organization. Powered by HubSpot Insights. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

yearFounded.description: The year the company was created. Powered by HubSpot Insights.

associatedVids.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

includePropertyVersions.description: By default, you will only get data for the most recent version of a property in the "versions" data. If you include this parameter, you will get data for all previous versions.

skipValidation.description: Whether or not to skip validation based on the form settings

properties.description:
Used to include specific deal properties in the results. By default, the results will only include Deal ID and will not include the values for any properties for your Deals.

Including this parameter will include the data for the specified property in the results. You can include this parameter multiple times to request multiple properties separated by a comma: ,.

. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

since.description: Only return deals created after timestamp x

includeAssociations.description: Whether to include the IDs of the associated contacts and companies in the results. This will also automatically include the num_associated_contacts property.

propertiesWithHistory.description: Works similarly to properties=, but this parameter will include the history for the specified property, instead of just including the current value. Use this parameter when you need the full history of changes to a property's value. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

filterGroupsUi.description: When multiple filters are provided within a filterGroup, they will be combined using a logical AND operator.
